DEFAULT_CALCULATOR.TITLE: Grade Calculator
DEFAULT_CALCULATOR.FAIL_MESSAGE: Sorry, you haven't passed the subject :(
DEFAULT_CALCULATOR.INVALID_GRADE_ALERT: Please enter a grade between 0 and 5

CUSTOM_CALCULATOR.TITLE: Custom Grade Calculator
CUSTOM_CALCULATOR.ADD_FIELD_ALERT: You must add at least one field to save the calculator.
CUSTOM_CALCULATOR.ERROR_EXCEEDS_MSG: Error: The sum of percentages is {{value}}%. It cannot exceed 100%.
CUSTOM_CALCULATOR.WARN_INCOMPLETE_MSG: The sum of percentages is {{value}}%. It must be 100% to calculate approval.
CUSTOM_CALCULATOR.FAIL_MESSAGE: Sorry, you haven't passed the subject :(

HELP_MODAL.TITLE: How to use the Grade Calculator?
HELP_MODAL.DEFAULT_CALC_ITEM_1: Enter the grades in the corresponding fields, for example: 4.5 or 3.0.
HELP_MODAL.DEFAULT_CALC_FORMATIVE_DESC: Evaluates continuous participation and has a weight of 15% (Cut 1 and Cut 2) and 20% (Cut 3).
HELP_MODAL.DEFAULT_CALC_COGNITIVE_DESC: Evaluates acquired knowledge and has a weight of 15% (Cut 1 and Cut 2) and 20% (Cut 3).
HELP_MODAL.DEFAULT_CALC_ITEM_2: After entering the grades, the results will be calculated automatically in real time.
HELP_MODAL.EXAMPLE_DESC: For a Formative Grade of 4.5 and a Cognitive Grade of 3.0:
HELP_MODAL.REMINDER: Remember that the total final grade must be greater than or equal to 3.0 to pass!
HELP_MODAL.NOTE_DESC_DEFAULT: The predefined percentages are based on the evaluation system of Universidad Americana - Colombia.
HELP_MODAL.UPDATE_DESC: The percentages have been updated according to the new evaluation system. Now Grades 1-4 have a weight of 15% each, and Grades 5-6 have a weight of 20% each.
HELP_MODAL.CUSTOM_CALC_INTRO_3: to enter your own grades and percentages according to your needs.
HELP_MODAL.CUSTOM_CALC_ITEM_1: Add as many fields as you need to reflect your evaluation system.
HELP_MODAL.CUSTOM_CALC_ITEM_2: Make sure the sum of all percentages is 100% to correctly calculate the total final grade.
HELP_MODAL.CUSTOM_CALC_ITEM_3: After entering your custom fields, the results will be calculated automatically in real time.
HELP_MODAL.CUSTOM_CALC_ITEM_4: Enter the minimum passing grade according to your academic system.
HELP_MODAL.NOTE_DESC_CUSTOM: You can customize the percentages according to the evaluation system you use.
